name: humanize-prose
description: Rewrite AI-generated or AI-assisted text to read as human-authored. Reduces common AI tells (em-dash overuse, 'delve'/'leverage', tricolons, reflex bullet lists, 'いかがでしたでしょうか', generic closers) while preserving meaning, register, and factual content. Bilingual: English and Japanese. Reader-experience focused, not detector evasion.
